/></C1DataColumn></DataCols><Styles type="C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.Design.ContextWrapper"><Data>Group{AlignVert:Center;Border:None,,0, 0, 0, 0;BackColor:ControlDark;}Style5{}Style23{}Style16{AlignHorz:Near;}Style17{}Selected{ForeColor:White;BackColor:DarkCyan;}Style21{AlignHorz:Near;}FilterWatermark{ForeColor:InfoText;BackColor:Info;}Style30{}Style10{AlignHorz:Near;}Style18{}Style25{}Caption{AlignHorz:Center;}EvenRow{ForeColor:Black;BackColor:OldLace;}Style8{}Style14{}Style19{}Style2{}Normal{Trimming:Character;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:None;Font:Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignHorz:Near;BackColor:DarkGray;ForeColor:White;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style6{}Style26{}Style4{}Style27{AlignHorz:Near;}Style31{}Footer{}OddRow{BackColor2:WhiteSmoke;ForeColor:Black;BackColor:LemonChiffon;}FilterBar{}Style7{}Style20{}Style11{}Style22{AlignHorz:Near;}Style28{AlignHorz:Near;}Editor{}Heading{Wrap:True;BackColor:Control;Border:Flat,ControlDark,0, 1, 0, 1;ForeColor:ControlText;AlignVert:Center;}Style29{}Style32{}Style12{}Style15{AlignHorz:Near;}Style9{}Style3{}RecordSelector{AlignImage:Center;}Inactive{ForeColor:InactiveCaptionText;BackColor:InactiveCaption;}HighlightRow{ForeColor:White;BackColor:DarkCyan;}Style13{}Style24{}Style1{}</Data></Styles><Splits><C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.DropdownView AllowColMove="False" Name="" AlternatingRowStyle="True" CaptionHeight="17" ColumnCaptionHeight="17" ColumnFooterHeight="17" ExtendRightColumn="True" MarqueeStyle="DottedCellBorder" DataField=""><FilterCancelText>&Close</FilterCancelText><FilterClearText>C&lear</FilterClearText><ValueItems /><GroupInfo /></C1DataColumn></DataCols><Styles type="C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.Design.ContextWrapper"><Data>Style128{AlignHorz:Near;}Group{AlignVert:Center;Border:None,,0, 0, 0, 0;BackColor:ControlDark;}Style127{AlignHorz:Near;}Style152{}Style138{}Style136{}Selected{BackColor2:MidnightBlue;ForeColor:HighlightText;BackColor:DarkCyan;}Style116{AlignHorz:Near;}Style147{}Style104{}FilterWatermark{ForeColor:InfoText;BackColor:Info;}Style130{}Style134{AlignHorz:Near;}Style120{}Style119{}Style151{}Style114{}Style112{AlignHorz:Near;BackColor:DarkOliveGreen;}Style144{}Caption{AlignHorz:Center;}EvenRow{ForeColor:Black;BackColor:MintCream;}Style143{}HighlightRow{GradientMode:ForwardDiagonal;BackColor2:Teal;ForeColor:Black;BackColor:Azure;GammaCorrection:True;}Style129{}Style106{}Style111{}Style124{}Style122{AlignHorz:Near;}Style108{}Normal{BackColor2:White;Alpha:255;Trimming:Character;AlignVert:Top;GradientMode:None;Font:Microsoft Sans Serif, 9.75pt;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;GammaCorrection:False;BackColor:White;AlignHorz:General;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style139{AlignHorz:Near;}Style137{}Inactive{GradientMode:None;ForeColor:InactiveCaptionText;BackColor:ButtonShadow;GammaCorrection:False;}Style148{}Style146{AlignHorz:Near;}Style132{}Style103{}Style105{}Style121{Trimming:Character;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;AlignHorz:Near;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Footer{GradientMode:None;AlignHorz:Center;Border:Inset,,1, 1, 1, 1;ForeColor:White;BackColor:DimGray;GammaCorrection:False;}OddRow{ForeColor:Black;}Style126{}FilterBar{}Editor{}Style115{Trimming:Character;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;ForegroundImagePos:LeftOfText;AlignHorz:Center;Alpha:255;AlignImage:Stretch;}Style145{AlignHorz:Near;}Style110{}Style140{AlignHorz:Near;}Style109{}Heading{BackColor2:DarkSlateGray;AlignVert:Center;GradientMode:Vertical;Wrap:True;AlignHorz:Center;Border:Flat,ControlDark,0, 1, 0, 1;ForeColor:White;BackColor:DarkSeaGreen;}Style125{}Style123{}Style141{}Style15{}Style118{}Style150{}Style107{}Style113{}Style117{}RecordSelector{AlignImage:Center;}Style149{}Style135{}Style133{AlignHorz:Near;}Style131{}Style142{}Style16{}</Data></Styles><Splits><C1.Win.C1TrueDBGrid.MergeView
